summary: Deep Learning Engines (Iteration 183) - All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verification successful - Deep Learning Section renders correctly with all 5 KPI cards, Self-Correct and Score Vendors buttons work, Vendor Maturity Distribution shows all 5 levels.

design_issues.screen: AI Learning page - Recent Learning Events table
issues: Minor HTML hydration warning: <tr> cannot be child of <span> - cosmetic issue, does not affect functionality (same as iteration 181/182)

critical_code_review_comments: Code review confirms 5 Deep Learning Engines are correctly implemented:
1. deep_learning_engine.py: All 5 engines implemented (extraction patterns, document similarity, self-correction, vendor maturity, predictive readiness)
2. posting_patterns.py lines 3007-3107: All 9 new deep learning endpoints correctly implemented
3. LearningDashboard.js: DeepLearningSection component correctly renders with all required data-testid attributes
4. All endpoints return valid data structures with proper error handling
5. Vendor maturity scoring uses 6 dimensions (volume, accuracy, consistency, recency, field_coverage, error_rate) with weighted composite score
seed_data_creation: None - tested with existing data from previous backfill
context_for_next_testing_agent: Deep Learning Engines feature fully tested. Key verifications: (1) GET /api/posting-patterns/deep-learning/summary returns all 5 engine sections (extraction_patterns, document_similarity, self_correction, vendor_maturity, predictive_readiness); (2) GET /api/posting-patterns/deep-learning/extraction-patterns/ANCH returns vendor extraction patterns; (3) GET /api/posting-patterns/deep-learning/extraction-hints/ANCH returns extraction hints; (4) POST /api/posting-patterns/deep-learning/self-correction/run?sample_size=20 runs audit (6 audited, 0 drifts); (5) GET /api/posting-patterns/deep-learning/self-correction/history returns audit history; (6) GET /api/posting-patterns/deep-learning/vendor-maturity/ANCH returns multi-dimensional maturity score (developing, score 58); (7) POST /api/posting-patterns/deep-learning/vendor-maturity/compute-all starts async computation; (8) Frontend Deep Learning Section renders at /ai-learning with data-testid='deep-learning-section'; (9) All 5 KPI cards render (extraction-patterns, fingerprints, audits, maturity, predictions); (10) Self-Correct button (data-testid='self-correction-btn') works; (11) Score Vendors button (data-testid='compute-maturity-btn') works; (12) Vendor Maturity Distribution shows all 5 levels (mastered, proficient, developing, learning, novice).
